mapper.insert: insert into kh_disease_category (id, name, name_english, is_leaf_node, parent_path, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nameEnglish,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isLeafNode,jdbcType=BIT}, #{parentPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update kh_disease_category set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name_english = #{nameEnglish,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_leaf_node = #{isLeafNode,jdbcType=BIT}, parent_path = #{parentPath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select id, name, name_english, is_leaf_node, parent_path, create_time, update_time from kh_disease_category
